objective_checks.detail: all pinned refs carry version comments

dimensions.name: Completeness
dimensions.rationale: Every remote GitHub-hosted action ref across both workflow files was pinned to a full commit SHA, including the second checkout in the lint job that had to be discovered rather than pointed at.

dimensions.name: Restraint
dimensions.rationale: The agent correctly left the local action (`./.github/actions/local-lint`) and the Docker ref (`docker://alpine:3.20`) untouched, and made no unrelated changes.

dimensions.name: Communication
dimensions.rationale: It clearly listed what was pinned and preserved version comments, but it never explained how it verified that the SHAs actually correspond to the tagged releases.
